fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Oklahoma Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Oklahoma — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license oklahoma, dental assistant certification oklahoma, RDA oklahoma, DANB CDA oklahoma, dental assistant radiography oklahoma

board.name: Oklahoma Board of Dentistry
board.mailing_address: 2920 N. Lincoln Blvd., Ste. C, Oklahoma City, OK 73105

license_types.title: Dental Assistant Permit
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Oklahoma.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.description: Register as a new user on the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal to gain access to the application forms.

steps.title: Complete Online Application
steps.description: Log in to the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal, select the Dental Assistant application, and accurately fill out all required sections with your personal and professional information.

steps.title: Upload Supporting Documents
steps.description: Upload all necessary documents, including your official high school transcript or GED equivalent and a current CPR card, directly through the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal.

steps.title: Complete Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Complete the Oklahoma Dental Act and Board Rules Jurisprudence Examination. A certificate of completion or attestation is typically submitted via the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal.

steps.title: Submit to Background Check
steps.description: Follow the specific instructions provided within the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal to complete the mandatory OSBI/FBI background check via fingerprinting.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Pay the non-refundable initial application fee of $50 through the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal to finalize your license submission.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Dental Assistant Permit through the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry by registration.

faqs.question: Does Oklahoma require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Oklahoma requires Dental Assistant Permit through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Oklahoma?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Oklahoma.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Oklahoma?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Oklahoma?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $25. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Dental assistants can apply for Dental Assistant Permit through the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry by registration.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Oklahoma
hero.dek: To apply for a Dental Assistant license in Oklahoma, applicants must register and submit their application through the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal.

official_links.portal_name: Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the Oklahoma Board of Dentistry Online Licensing Portal, click 'Register' (or 'New User Registration'), and follow the prompts to create an account using your email address and personal information. Once registered, log in to start your Dental Assistant application.
